info.name: Spellfire Initiate
info.description: The Spellfire Initiate background from Forgotten Realms: Heroes of Faerûn.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

li.i: Choose one kind of Gaming Set

ul.li: Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Gaming Set (same as above), Arcane Focus (Crystal or Wand), 2 Pouches, Traveler’s Clothes, 36 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You bear the gift of spellfire: a rare form of magic that channels the raw power of the Weave. Wielding spellfire takes a heavy toll on the body. You’ve trained both mind and body to efficiently wield this sacred power.

setters.set: Constitution, Intelligence, Charisma, Spellfire Spark Feat, Arcana and Perception Skills, and one kind of Gaming Set
